title: Orbital strike beacon
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Orbital strike beacons''' were devices used to pinpoint locations for capital ships in orbit [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|to bomb]]. They were used in battles such as the [[Battle of Mustafar (Imperial Period)|Battle of Mustafar]] and the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]''
*''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Elite Squadron]]''
*''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron]]''

[[Category:Targeting systems]]
